item.title: They are searching for slight comfort, they are searching for wellness and well-being, at the cost of literal lives of Palestini...
item.description:
They are searching for slight comfort, they are searching for wellness and well-being, at the cost of literal lives of Palestinians.

item.title: Once again: these ideology’s as a reaction to a despicable system are not surprising, but they are not liberatory
item.description:
Once again: these ideology’s as a reaction to a despicable system are not surprising, but they are not liberatory. And they cause real, immediate harm
